updatedFrame.prompt: Preserve Akio Kageyama, his armor, pose, scale and the nocturnal pixel-art palette. Replace the close Kurokawa street with the forest pass of Kai: muddy cedar road in the foreground, bamboo grove in the middle distance, terraced rice fields beyond it, and the burning fortified town only as a small distant silhouette. Remove the foreground torii and any impression that Akio is already inside the city. No text, UI, logo or border.
